response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior software developer with broad web, mobile, and some systems-level experience, but he does not meet the core requirements for this embedded networking security role. He lacks native-level Japanese proficiency (a hard requirement), demonstrable Linux kernel analysis and modification experience, and hands-on background in L2/L3 networking, switch products, or security technologies like MACsec and 802.1X. His C experience (National Instruments, ~6 months) is limited relative to the strong C-for-UNIX proficiency required.
strengths: Long, diverse engineering career including some C/C++ and low-latency systems work (DLang at Sociomantic)
Solid Linux, Docker, and CI/CD/dev-ops infrastructure experience
Strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, testing tools, open-source contributions)
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency listed — a mandatory requirement for this role
No embedded networking, LAN-switch, or security-protocol (MACsec, 802.1X, SNMP/NETCONF) experience
Minimal recent C programming and no Linux kernel investigation or modification experience
